description_long: This is an ornate chandelier with five arms, each supporting a lampshade that appears to be made of a translucent mesh or fabric. The central body is composed of a decorative, bulbous structure with intricate, curling metalwork extending outward to form the arms. Each arm is adorned with a series of faceted, crystal-like beads or pendants that add a touch of elegance and reflectivity. The chandelier is suspended from a chain, which is attached to the top of the central body. The overall design is symmetrical, with a classic and sophisticated aesthetic suitable for upscale urban interiors or public spaces. The combination of metal, glass, and fabric elements gives it a luxurious and refined appearance.
description: An elegant chandelier with five mesh-shaded arms, ornate curling metalwork, and crystal-like decorative beads, suspended by a chain. The design is symmetrical and sophisticated, blending metal, glass, and fabric.
description_view_0: Side view showing three of the five mesh lampshades and the curling metal arms with crystal-like beads.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying all five lampshades evenly spaced, with the central body and symmetrical arm arrangement clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the overlapping arms and shades, with the decorative beads visible along the arms.
description_view_3: Rear or alternate frontal view, showing the full symmetry of the chandelier and the arrangement of all five shades.
